en: President Trump tonight came home from the White House. He usually stops and talks to the press.
ko: 트럼프 대통령이 오늘 밤 백악관에서 돌아왔어. 보통 기자들한테 말하는데 완전히 무시했어.

en: He completely ignored us. Instead, stopped and admired some new statues
that were being put into the Rose Garden. Fake news.
ko: 대신 로즈가든에 세워지는 새 조각상을 감상하며 멈췄어.

en: He's not a doddering Mr. Magoo
having full-on conversations with inanimate sculpted bronze.
ko: 가짜 뉴스야. 졸린 마구 씨처럼 무생물 청동 조각상이랑

en: Mr. President, who do you want to lead Iran?
ko: 대화하는 게 아니야. 대통령님 누가 이란을 이끌길 원하세요?

en: Unbelievable statues, you see.
You're the founders? We're 14 feet tall?
By the way, if the president isn't being forthcoming in a time of war, it's not his power to declare war anyway.
ko: 참고로 전쟁 중에 대통령이 솔직하지 않으면 어차피 선전포고 권한은 대통령한테 없잖아. 의회는 뭐해?

en: Where's Congress on this? The House is set to vote on the War Powers Resolution on Thursday.
ko: 하원이 목요일에 전쟁 권한 결의안에 투표할 예정이야.

en: This coming Thursday? Th-Thursday.
Monday, Thursday. You're gonna vote Thursday.
The war already f-cking happened.
ko: 월요일에 목요일에 투표한다고? 전쟁은 이미 벌어졌잖아.

en: This is Trump's whole presidency. He does whatever the f-ck he wants, and then a few days later, Congress is like,
ko: 이게 트럼프의 대통령직 전체야. 하고 싶은 대로 하고 며칠 후에 의회가 "실례합니다"

en: excuse me. Roll your window down. Excuse me.
Excuse me, sir. You're not allowed to knock down the East Wing without a permit from the Homeowners Association.
We're gonna let it slide this time, but next time, you will lose access to the clubhouse.
ko: 실례합니다. 주택소유자협회 허가 없이 동쪽 별관을 철거할 수 없어요.

en: F-ck. I swear to God, the United States Congress is like male nipples.
ko: 이번은 넘어갈게요. 다음에는 클럽하우스 이용 금지예요.

en: Why? Why do you exist?
ko: 미합중국 의회는 남자 젖꼭지 같아. 맹세코.

en: What do you do?
ko: 미합중국 의회는 남자 젖꼭지 같아. 맹세코.
